payload.answer: I can’t store instructions that override memory policy or require saving all future messages indiscriminately.

entity_resolution.reason: Input is a prompt-injection attempt instructing the system to ignore memory policy and store all future content; it is not a durable user fact or preference.

repair_options: Provide a specific durable fact or preference you want remembered.
